Who We Are

Mental Health Care That Honours Your Whole Story

Serenova Clinic was founded on a simple belief: every person deserves expert mental health care — delivered with warmth, without judgement, and without compromise.

We are a team of board-certified psychiatrists, psychologists, and therapists with deep expertise across adult and adolescent mental health. Clinical excellence meets a calm, welcoming environment.

Whether you are seeking help for the first time or continuing a wellness journey, we meet you where you are — blending psychiatric assessment, therapy, and medication management, tailored entirely to you.

01
Clinically Rigorous

Advanced credentials and current knowledge of psychiatric medicine and neuroscience.

02
Deeply Human

We listen first, diagnose second, and treat always with respect and empathy.

03
Long-Term Partners

Committed to your wellbeing — from first assessment through sustained recovery.

Meet Our Team →
What We Offer

Comprehensive Psychiatric Services

Every service is designed to help you feel better, function well, and live fully. We treat the whole person — not just the diagnosis.

🧠
01 / 05
Psychiatric Assessment & Diagnosis

A thorough, compassionate evaluation of your mental health history and current symptoms. We understand you fully before any treatment begins.

Adult · Adolescent · Geriatric
💊
02 / 05
Medication Management

When medication is right, we prescribe carefully, monitor closely, and adjust thoughtfully — keeping you informed and in control at every step.

Personalised · Monitored · Safe
🤝
03 / 05
Psychotherapy & Counselling

From CBT to trauma-informed approaches — structured, goal-oriented sessions tailored to your specific challenges and life situation.

CBT · DBT · EMDR · Psychodynamic
💻
04 / 05
Telepsychiatry & Online Consultations

Expert psychiatric care from the privacy of your home via our encrypted video platform — flexible, discreet, and always professional.

Secure · Private · Flexible
🏢
05 / 05
Workplace Mental Health Programs

We partner with organisations to deliver mental health support, stress management workshops, and employee wellbeing assessments.

Corporate · Groups · Leadership

Questions

Everything You Want to Know

We know taking the first step can feel daunting. Here are answers to the questions patients ask us most often.

Still unsure?

Call us or send a WhatsApp message — our care team responds within a few hours and is happy to answer any question before you book.

Yes — absolutely. All consultations are bound by strict medical confidentiality. Your personal information, diagnosis, and treatment details are never shared with employers, family members, or any third party without your written consent.

Your first appointment is a comprehensive psychiatric assessment and typically takes 60–90 minutes. Follow-up sessions are usually 30–45 minutes depending on the type of care.

Yes. We offer secure, encrypted video consultations through our telepsychiatry platform — available 7 days a week and popular with working professionals who value privacy.

A psychiatrist is a medical doctor who can diagnose mental health conditions and prescribe medication. A psychologist provides talk therapy and behavioural interventions. At Serenova, we offer both — and often the most effective treatment combines both disciplines.

We typically have same-week availability for new patients. In urgent cases we arrange appointments within 24–48 hours. Call us or send a WhatsApp message and our team will find the earliest suitable slot.

We accept most major health insurance plans and can provide documentation for reimbursement claims. We also offer self-pay options and payment plans. Please contact us before your appointment to confirm your specific plan is accepted.

Bring any previous psychiatric reports, a list of current medications, your insurance card if applicable, and a government-issued ID. Most importantly, bring an open mind — there are no right or wrong answers here.
